column1: Neither Alex_________Gareth knew that I'd seen them take the money.
I thought it was strange when both lan____________Anne left at the same time.
We could order either a chicken salad____________a green salad.
Evi was neither embarrassed___________angry when Victoria told her to shut up.
Passengers can both watch  recent movies_____________listen to great albums on may of our flights.
I have neither the money____________the time to go on holiday right now.
